conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Looking into getting a dog -- narrowed it down to a Labrador, a Border Collie, or a Corgi.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I've been meaning to reorganize the garage for weeks now.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I finally fixed the squeaky hinge on my front door.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Labradors are supposed to be pretty easygoing and good with kids, which matters since my niece visits a lot.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My car's tire pressure light came on this morning.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The office is switching to a new time-tracking tool next month.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Corgis are small enough for the apartment but I've read they can be more stubborn to train.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I switched my podcast subscription to a cheaper plan.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to update my resume before applying to anything new.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Border Collies need a ton of exercise, but that actually matches my hiking habit pretty well since I'm out most weekends anyway.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to schedule a haircut, it's overdue at this point.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Finally updated the resume, took longer than expected to word everything right.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Got a reminder that my credit card statement is due soon.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Visited a Border Collie rescue and the energy level in person was honestly intense, in a good way for my lifestyle.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The Labrador is probably the safer, easier choice overall though.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My laptop update took forever to install last night.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My favorite coffee shop started doing a loyalty card program.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Talked to the rescue about how much daily exercise a Border Collie actually needs and it lines up almost exactly with my weekend hiking routine.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Decided on a Border Collie. The energy level really does match my hiking habit, more than the Labrador or the Corgi would.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Going to fill out the adoption application this week.

query: Which breed did the user decide to adopt?

answer_contains: energy level really does match my hiking habit
